topic: A yellow New York City taxi driving through Times Square, street-level view.

parsed_generation.script:
SHOT 1: EXT. TIMES SQUARE – STREET LEVEL – DAY. A yellow NYC taxi enters from the left, moving toward the camera at street level.
SHOT 2: EXT. TIMES SQUARE – STREET LEVEL – DAY. A yellow NYC taxi glides through the frame, centered, with neon signs blurred in the background.
SHOT 3: EXT. TIMES SQUARE – STREET LEVEL – DAY. A yellow NYC taxi continues down the avenue, the city lights streaking past along the frame edge.
parsed_generation.narration: In the neon heartbeat of Times Square, a yellow taxi cuts a single bright line through the street-level view. The city blurs around it as signs blaze and traffic murmurs, yet the cab remains the focal point—shiny, constant motion in a kaleidoscope of color.

feedback: The result largely adheres to the brief, delivering a street-level Times Square taxi sequence with a clear focal subject. To improve, add more vivid sensory details and sharper camera variations to boost visual richness, and tighten the narration to align with the visuals without over-describing. Consider ensuring the time of day remains consistent across shots and perhaps add a subtle motion cue between shots.
